chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Jail Appeal No. 307 of 2020 (Habibullah vs. The State) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on M.A.No. 13003/2022 2. For orders on M.A.No. 9472/2022 3. For hearing of case 4. For hearing of M.A.No. 12796/2022 04.11.2022 Mr. Ajab Khan Khattak advocate for the appellant Mr. Khadim Hussain Addl. P.G -.-.-.-.-.-. By way of listed application (MA No.12796/2022), appellant Habibullah has sought for his release on bail for the reason that including remission, he has already served out 23 years of his sentence, yet his appeal is not being disposed of, which is not opposed by learned Addl. P.G for the State. In view of above, while relying upon case of Makhdoom Javed Hashmi vs. The State (2007 SCMR 1844), the sentence awarded to the appellant Habibullah is suspended, consequently, he is directed to be released on bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. The listed application (M.A.No. 12796/2022) is disposed of accordingly. Adjourned to a date in office for haring of main appeal. J U D G E
